Command.Name: __default_command
Command.Description: Generates dependency graphs for .NET projects and NuGet packages.

Argument.Name: SOURCE
Argument.Description: The source of the graph. Can be either a directory containing a .NET project, a .NET project file (csproj) or the name of a NuGet package, optionally with a specific version, e.g. [b]Newtonsoft.Json/13.0.3[/].

Option.Description: The direction of the dependency graph. Possible values are [b]LeftToRight[/] and [b]TopToBottom[/]

The online service to use when the [b]--output[/] option is not specified. Use [b]mmd[/] or [b]mermaid[/] for Mermaid Live Editor https://mermaid.live Use [b]dot[/], [b]gv[/] or [b]graphviz[/] for Edotor https://edotor.net
The target framework to consider when building the dependency graph.
Packages to ignore in the dependency graph. May be used multiple times.
Include package versions in the dependency graph. E.g. [b]Serilog/3.1.1[/] instead of [b]Serilog[/]
The NuGet operations log level. Possible values are [b]Debug[/], [b]Verbose[/], [b]Information[/], [b]Minimal[/], [b]Warning[/] and [b]Error[/]
Do not open the default browser, only print the graph URL on the console when the [b]--output[/] option is not specified.
Remove clickable links from the the dependency graph. Can be useful to reduce the size of the graph if you get "Maximum text size in diagram exceeded" in Mermaid Live Editor.
The path to the dependency graph output file. If not specified, the dependency graph URL is written on the standard output and an online service is opened in the default browser.
The target runtime to consider when building the dependency graph.
The title of the dependency graph. Defaults to [b]Dependency graph of [i][[SOURCE]][/][/]
